title: Handover Work 交接工作
scene: 离职员工向接替者交接工作

lines.en: I have prepared everything for the handover. Let me show you.
lines.zh: 我已经准备好了交接材料。让我给你介绍一下。

lines.en: Thank you. I really appreciate you taking the time.
lines.zh: 谢谢。真的很感谢您花时间。

lines.en: No problem. Here is a list of all ongoing projects.
lines.zh: 不客气。这是所有进行中的项目清单。

lines.en: Got it. Which one is the most urgent?
The client report due next Friday. I have done about half.
lines.zh: 下周五要交的客户报告。我已经完成了一半。

lines.en: I see. Who should I contact if I have questions?
lines.zh: 明白了。如果有问题我该联系谁？

lines.en: You can reach out to David on the third floor.
Perfect. I will also check these shared folders.
lines.zh: 很好。我也会查看这些共享文件夹。

lines.en: Yes, all files are organized there. Good luck in your new role.
lines.zh: 是的，所有文件都整理在那里了。祝你在新岗位上好运。
